title: Codex CLI command injection via exec() with unsanitized format string arguments
description: The terminal-chat component uses exec() with a format string that interpolates cwd and message preview into an osascript shell command. A crafted cwd or message containing shell metacharacters (e.g. $(rm -rf /)) achieves arbitrary command execution. The fix replaces exec() with spawn() to avoid shell interpretation. Found via commit audit of openai/codex: 63c99e7d 'use spawn instead of exec to avoid injection vulnerability'.
